name: diagGetCommParameter
title: diagGetCommParameter
description: Returns the value of a numeric/textual communication parameter of the given or currently active diagnostic description. The values are read from the diagnostic description if they cannot be set in the configuration dialog.

parameters.name: CANoe.AddressMode
parameters.description: ISO TP address mode: 0: Normal 1: Extended 2: NormalFixed 3: Mixed <0: No ISO TP

return: Error code or value of the parameter.

description: For details and an example please refer to the reference implementation of the K-Line CAPL Callback Interface for diagnostics that is installed under
